# pangolin_resource_role (Resource)

Assigns a role to a Pangolin HTTP resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_resource_role" "example" {
  resource_id = pangolin_resource.example.id
  role_id     = pangolin_role.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `resource_id` (Number) The ID of the HTTP resource.
- `role_id` (Number) The ID of the role to assign.
